hero.label: Boutique digital
hero.title: We connect code
hero.description: Web, marketing, and growth consulting — built by small hands, with the kind of care that treats your project like our own.

services.label: What we do
services.title: Four fronts,
services.intro: From code to growth, all under one roof. You talk to one person — me — and the delivery comes whole.

items.title: Web development
items.subtitle: Sites and apps that load fast and convert.
items.description: Next.js, React, Tailwind. Lighthouse 90+, technical SEO baked in, animations that respect the user. From startup MVP to flagship sites.

items.title: Digital marketing
items.subtitle: Traffic that turns into customers — not vanity.
items.description: Online presence strategy built around the real funnel: Acquisition, Activation, Retention, Revenue, Referral. Content, technical SEO, paid ads when they make sense.

items.title: Growth consulting
items.subtitle: Where to start — and what to do next.
items.description: For founders just starting or businesses that stalled. We map the opportunities, prioritize the moves, and skip the empty buzzwords.

items.title: Data & analytics
items.subtitle: Decisions guided by numbers, not vibes.
items.description: Analytics setup, custom dashboards, honest reads of what the data is saying. You learn what works — and stop spending where it doesn't.

showcase.label: Featured work
showcase.title: Projects that left
showcase.intro: Each one was a different problem — and each one is still live, doing its job.

process.label: How we work
process.title: Four steps.
process.intro: From the first coffee to the deploy. You always know where we are.

steps.title: First conversation
steps.description: I learn the problem, the audience, the budget. I leave with scope and timeline. No 30-page proposals — two pages do it.

steps.title: Design & strategy
steps.description: Wireframes, identity, copy. You sign off on every step before code happens. Nothing is a surprise.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Incremental builds, preview link per commit. You watch progress in real time and shape direction along the way.

steps.title: Launch & continuity
steps.description: Deploy, monitoring, post-launch tweaks. Optional monthly maintenance and growth retainer.

ctaPrimary.title: Ready to take the idea
ctaPrimary.description: Drop a message. I respond within 24h with clear next steps — no inflated proposal, no chase-up needed.

ctaSecondary.title: Business already running but stuck?
ctaSecondary.description: Strategic 1-hour diagnosis. You leave with 3 concrete opportunities you can attack this week.

about.label: About
about.title: Small studio,
about.intro: Fronnexus is born of two words: front (frontend) and conexus (connection). That's exactly the work — the bridge between well-built code and real people.

story.title: The short story
story.p1: I started freelance, shipping sites for restaurants and salons. The problem was rarely just technical — it was strategy, positioning, the lack of someone who saw the whole picture.
story.p2: Today Fronnexus runs four fronts: web, marketing, consulting, data. All under one door, with one person handling — no handoff to subcontractors, no disappearing after the contract.
story.p3: I work with SMBs in Brazil and abroad — already shipped for clients in Portugal, the Netherlands, and Brazil. The tone is always the same: speak straight, deliver whole, stay reachable after.

items.title: Speak straight
items.description: No agency jargon. If something won't work, I say so. If you're asking for the wrong thing, I redirect.

items.title: Boutique care
items.description: You talk to a person — not an account-management team. Every project gets real priority, not a queue.

items.title: Modern stack, no hype
items.description: Next.js, React, Supabase, Vercel. Tech chosen because it solves — not because it's trending.

items.title: Continuity
items.description: I deliver and stay. Post-launch tweaks, maintenance, next steps. The relationship is long, not transactional.

contact.label: Let's talk
contact.title: Got an idea, project,
contact.intro: I respond in 24h. If urgent, ping on WhatsApp. If big, book a call.

placeholders.details: I want a new site for my clinic with online scheduling and a blog. I already have brand identity but the current site is dead…

success.title: Message received
success.body: Back to you within 24h with next steps. If urgent, ping WhatsApp.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: Try again, or email the address below directly.

footer.tagline: Boutique digital — development, marketing, and growth.

sections.title: Who we are
sections.body: Fronnexus is a boutique digital studio operated by Ericky Dias, based in Brazil with global delivery.

sections.title: Data we collect
sections.body: Only what's needed to reply to you and run the service: name, email, phone, company, and the project details you send. We don't sell or share with third parties.

sections.title: How we use it
sections.body: To respond, send proposals, run the project, and — only with permission — include the case in our showcase. Never spam.

sections.title: GDPR / LGPD
sections.body: You can request access, correction, or deletion of your data at any time. Just email hello@fronnexus.org.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body: Only essential cookies (preferred language). We don't track you across sites.
